title: Moonshort Episode Mini-Game Config
description: Per-scene config that drives game selection and asset injection for the episode content pipeline.

sceneId.description: Kebab-case scene identifier within the episode, e.g. scene02

attribute.description: Character attribute echoed in settlement payload, e.g. Charm

primaryColor.description: Hex theme color seed passed to the game, e.g. #FF6B9D

sceneContext.description: Natural language description of the scene for LLM game selection. Required when gameId is not provided.

sceneType.description: Broad scene category used as a hint for static fallback mapping.

difficulty.description: Desired difficulty level; influences game pool selection.

gameId.description: Direct game override. When present, skips LLM selection entirely.

character.description: Optional character asset injected into the game HUD.

background.description: Optional scene background image injected behind the game canvas.

speaker.description: Character name shown above the dialogue box

portraitUrl.description: Portrait URL override for this specific line; falls back to characters[speaker]

narrative.description: Pre-game dialogue lines. Items can be plain strings or {speaker, text, portraitUrl?} objects for per-line character switching.

characters.description: Multi-character portrait map for the narrative overlay. Keys = character display names; values = portrait image URLs. Used as fallback when a narrative line does not carry its own portraitUrl.
